name: list_mine
_note: sessions.list_mine lists the caller's own sessions (per-user scoped by ctx.actor.userId — never leaks). With a live migrated DB + the assassin owner actor, {} returns ok:true with an empty list (that internal user owns no sessions). limit is a fail-CLOSED numeric guard — a poisoned value returns ok:false invalid_limit, never a clamped ok:true. Never no_db / no_user under the assassin.
